title: Thoracostachyum parvibracteum
taxonomy: Thoracostachyum parvibracteum belongs to the family Zingiberaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the ginger family. This plant is classified as a genus within the family. The genus Thoracostachyum is part of the order Zingiberales, which includes various species of flowering plants native to Southeast Asia. Further classification of Thoracostachyum parvibracteum includes its species status within the genus. The full classification of the plant is as follows: Thoracostachyum parvibracteum, Zingiberaceae, Zingiberales, Monocotyledons, Magnoliophyta.
